name: POST /api/leads/:id/advance - Advance a lead to the next workflow step
description: Operator-facing workflow execution endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen. Resolves the lead's current step in the lead-to-customer workflow (default; ?workflow=<slug> picks another) and persists the next step's LeadStage via the same repository path PATCH /api/leads/:id uses. Returns the updated LeadRecord plus the recomputed WorkflowExecutionState. 409 when the lead is already at a terminal stage or on the final step; 404 when the id doesn't resolve.

testCases.name: Advance a freshly captured lead one step down the workflow
